languages.text: "Поздно, доктор. Ей уже не нужно лечение. Пусть снадобье пригодится тому, кого еще можно спасти".

traits.locale_text: "Поздно, доктор. Ей уже не нужно лечение. Пусть снадобье пригодится тому, кого еще можно спасти".

languages.text: "It's too late, medicae. She no longer needs treatment. Maybe this potion can be of use to someone who can still be saved."
languages.original_text: "Поздно, доктор. Ей уже не нужно лечение. Пусть снадобье пригодится тому, кого еще можно спасти".

traits.locale_text: "It's too late, medicae. She no longer needs treatment. Maybe this potion can be of use to someone who can still be saved."
"It's too late, medicae. She no longer needs treatment. Maybe this potion can be of use to someone who can still be saved."
"It's too late, medicae. She no longer needs treatment. Maybe this potion can be of use to someone who can still be saved."

languages.text: 「もう遅い、メディカ。彼女はもう治療の必要はない。この薬は、まだ救える人たちに役立つかもしれない」
languages.original_text: "It's too late, medicae. She no longer needs treatment. Maybe this potion can be of use to someone who can still be saved."

languages.text: "Çok geç sıhhiyeci. Tedaviye ihtiyacı kalmadı. Belki bu iksir, hâlâ kurtarılabilir birinin işine yarar."
languages.original_text: "It's too late, medicae. She no longer needs treatment. Maybe this potion can be of use to someone who can still be saved."

traits.locale_text: "Çok geç sıhhiyeci. Tedaviye ihtiyacı kalmadı. Belki bu iksir, hâlâ kurtarılabilir birinin işine yarar."

languages.text: “太迟了，医务官。她已经用不上了。或许应该把这瓶药留给更有希望的人。”
languages.original_text: "It's too late, medicae. She no longer needs treatment. Maybe this potion can be of use to someone who can still be saved."

traits.locale_text: “太迟了，医务官。她已经用不上了。或许应该把这瓶药留给更有希望的人。”

languages.text: "Zu spät, Medicae. Sie braucht keine Medizin mehr. Vielleicht könnt Ihr mit diesem Trank ja jemand anderen retten."
languages.original_text: "It's too late, medicae. She no longer needs treatment. Maybe this potion can be of use to someone who can still be saved."

traits.locale_text: "Zu spät, Medicae. Sie braucht keine Medizin mehr. Vielleicht könnt Ihr mit diesem Trank ja jemand anderen retten."

languages.text: « C'est trop tard, medicae. Elle n'a plus besoin de traitement. Mais cette mixture pourrait être utile à quelqu'un qui peut encore être sauvé. »
languages.original_text: "It's too late, medicae. She no longer needs treatment. Maybe this potion can be of use to someone who can still be saved."

traits.locale_text: « C'est trop tard, medicae. Elle n'a plus besoin de traitement. Mais cette mixture pourrait être utile à quelqu'un qui peut encore être sauvé. »

languages.text: «Es tarde, medicae, ya no necesita tratamiento. Tal vez su pócima pueda servir para salvar a otra persona».
languages.original_text: "It's too late, medicae. She no longer needs treatment. Maybe this potion can be of use to someone who can still be saved."

traits.locale_text: «Es tarde, medicae, ya no necesita tratamiento. Tal vez su pócima pueda servir para salvar a otra persona».
